prediction.reasoning: Predicting future stock prices with precision is highly challenging and beyond the scope of an AI without real-time market data, historical volatility, and advanced financial models. This prediction is generated based on the current price ($756.47) and a simplified, hypothetical volatility assumption. Specifically, an 18-day price standard deviation equivalent to approximately 2.5% of the current price was assumed. This assumption was then used with standard Z-scores for normal distribution to construct illustrative confidence intervals. It does not incorporate any fundamental analysis, technical indicators, market news, or historical price trends specific to CAT, and therefore should not be used as financial advice.
